title: Coccocypselum obovatum
taxonomy: Coccocypselum obovatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Coccocypselum, which is a group of plants commonly known as 'lipstick flowers' due to their bright colors. Coccocypselum obovatum is native to Central and South America, where it can be found growing in tropical environments. The plant is characterized by its showy, fragrant flowers and oval-shaped leaves. It is often cultivated in gardens for its attractive flowers and ability to attract pollinators.
